flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY Morrisville rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.3k → $6.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY Morrisville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at SUNY Morrisville rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (25.6% → 29.5%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY Morrisville rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (26.4% → 29.8%).
